title: Seaweed Forest
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Seaweed Forest''' was an undersea region located on the watery planet known as [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. Several distinctive landmarks were established in this area including the [[Whaladon/Legends|Whaladon]] graveyard, and the [[Whaladon Processing Center]]. The hunter known as [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dunwell]] frequently operated in these waters with a small crew of [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] laborers, hunting the valuable Whaladon mammals.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''
